name: NES (curated working subset)
source: Nintendo Entertainment System 2C02 PPU palette — hex values are an emulator approximation (NTSC), commonly cited (e.g. Nestopia/FCEUX). The real NES palette is generated by the PPU, so exact RGB varies by TV/emulator.
notes: A working subset, not the full 64-entry table. Hardware limit per sprite is 3 colors + transparent from one 4-color sub-palette, so design each sprite around a 3-color ramp from here. Treat hex as approximate.
